name: claude-harness
description: Shared, project-neutral Claude Code harness reusable across any repo. Same skill names/functions everywhere; each project tailors only its stack-specific bits locally.

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Canonical, stack-agnostic harness: the /create-issue skill (goal → researched GitHub issue) and the /finish-pr skill (drive a PR to merge-ready — reconcile against drift, then implement & fix it), plus generic code-reviewer and test-runner subagents and SessionStart automation.
